name: ZESCO Limited
description: ZESCO is Zambia's national power utility responsible for generation, transmission, and distribution of electricity. It operates Kariba North Bank, Kafue Gorge, and other hydropower stations.

name: Zambia Revenue Authority
description: ZRA is the government agency responsible for collecting taxes and customs duties on behalf of the Government of Zambia. It administers income tax, VAT, customs, and excise duties.

name: Bank of Zambia
description: Bank of Zambia is the central bank responsible for monetary policy, financial system stability, and regulation of financial institutions. It manages foreign exchange reserves and issues currency.

name: National Pension Scheme Authority
description: NAPSA administers the national pension scheme for Zambian workers in both public and private sectors. It manages pension contributions and investments for over 1.2 million members.

name: Road Development Agency
description: RDA is responsible for the development, rehabilitation, and maintenance of Zambia's national road network of over 67,000 km. It manages road construction contracts and fuel levy disbursements.

name: Zambia National Building Society
description: ZNBS provides mortgage finance and housing loans to Zambian citizens. It is the oldest building society in Zambia and plays a key role in the government's affordable housing programme.
